meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Project Management for Freelancers: Speed Up Your Dev Workflow
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with slow development. Master professional project management using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship client projects faster than ever before.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, shift from manual coding to an AI-orchestrated lifecycle. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for automated implementation, you decouple logic from syntax. This systematic approach allows you to iterate faster, maintain cleaner codebases, and deliver high-performance applications in half the time.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen at 2 AM, the deadline is looming, and your codebase feels like a tangled web of technical debt. It’s the silent killer of the freelance career: velocity erosion. Every minute spent fighting syntax or manual boilerplate is a minute you aren't scaling your business or enjoying your life.

But what if you could treat your development process like a refined assembly line? By leveraging AI-native tooling, we move from 'writing code' to 'orchestrating features.' This tutorial dismantles the bottleneck of slow development, transforming your workflow into a high-octane engine for client delivery.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Define your project structure before writing a single line of code. This ensures your foundation is modular and scalable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular project structure for a SaaS MVP including folder architecture, configuration files, and initial dependency definitions.

steps.title: Requirement Mapping
steps.description: Translate client needs into technical specifications that the AI can ingest without ambiguity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these functional requirements and generate a technical specification document formatted for automated implementation.

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Eliminate repetitive tasks by generating all necessary boilerplate code based on your architectural plan.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the core API boilerplate and database schema based on the technical specification provided.

steps.title: Context-Aware Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to implement features while maintaining deep context of your entire project directory.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the user authentication module using the existing project structure and best security practices.

steps.title: Automated Refactoring & Testing
steps.description: Ensure your code meets production standards by running automated refactors and unit tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current implementation for performance bottlenecks and refactor for production-grade efficiency.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'context.md' file that tracks project state; this prevents the AI from hallucinating outdated architectural decisions.
Use git hooks to trigger Claude Code automated linting on every commit to keep your codebase pristine without manual effort.
Define custom system prompts for your AI tools that reflect your specific coding style to reduce the amount of post-generation cleanup.
Prioritize building a reusable 'component library' within Antigravity so you can clone your UI patterns across different client projects.
Treat your AI as a junior developer: provide explicit constraints on complexity to avoid 'over-engineering' during the implementation phase.
content.next_steps: Once you have automated your initial stack, focus on building a custom library of 'Antigravity Blueprints' to reduce your setup time to near-zero for future client projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting slow development hold your freelance business back. Implement these systems today and reclaim your time, your sanity, and your profit margins. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
